name: Idyllwild Mountain Cabins
demoNotice: Demo draft, not an official website.
headline: Your Private Mountain Retreat Awaits.
description: Idyllwild Mountain Cabins offers handcrafted log cabins with panoramic forest views, direct trail access, and the tranquility only theCalifornia mountains can provide.

features.title: Secluded Forest Setting
features.description: Nestled among tall pines on 5 private acres.

features.title: Handcrafted Log Construction
features.description: Authentic mountain architecture with modern comforts.

features.title: Direct Trail Access
features.description: Step onto hiking and biking trails right from your door.

features.title: Year-Round fireplace
features.description: Cozy wood-burning fireplaces in every cabin.
